description: Deep parameter registry for MVP Quantum Materials v0.4.1. Evidence tiers: CONST_EXACT (SI 2019 defining constant), CONST_DERIVED (derived physical constant with negligible uncertainty), T0 (toy/demonstrative), T1 (literature-inspired form), T1_candidate (conceptually linkable to literature), T2 (literature-supported candidate range), T3 (calibration-required), TX (forbidden physical interpretation), NUM (numerical-only).

parameters.name: Elementary charge
parameters.rationale: Exact by 2019 SI redefinition (defining constant).
parameters.limitations: none

parameters.name: Boltzmann constant
parameters.rationale: Exact by 2019 SI redefinition (defining constant).
parameters.limitations: none

parameters.name: Vacuum permittivity
parameters.measurement_method: derived from epsilon_0 = 1/(mu_0 * c^2); mu_0 carries uncertainty via fine-structure constant alpha
parameters.rationale: NOT a 2019 SI defining constant. Derived from c (exact) and mu_0 (now carries experimental uncertainty ~1.5e-10 relative). For MVP purposes the uncertainty is negligible.
parameters.limitations: Not exact in the same sense as q or k_B. CODATA recommended value.

parameters.name: Relative permittivity of Si
parameters.rationale: Well-established textbook value. Temperature dependence is weak.
parameters.limitations: Varies slightly with doping, strain, and temperature.

parameters.name: Relative permittivity of SiO2
parameters.rationale: Standard textbook value for thermally grown oxide.
parameters.limitations: Depends on oxide growth conditions.

parameters.name: Interface trap density
parameters.role: reference range for future N_ref mapping (not active in code)
parameters.conversion_to_SI: multiply by 6.242e22 to get J^-1 m^-2
parameters.rationale: Well-established range for Si/SiO2 interfaces. Connors2022 provides device context for Si/SiGe but is not used as direct D_it numerical anchor.
parameters.limitations: Temperature-dependent extraction. Cryogenic D_it characterization is challenging.
parameters.do_not_claim: Do not claim specific D_it value for any device.

parameters.name: Reference charge density scale (active in code)
parameters.role: effective charge closure normalization — active code value
parameters.rationale: Active code value remains a dimensionless demonstrative scale. No promotion to physically-anchored tier.
parameters.limitations: No physical interpretation allowed for active code value.
parameters.do_not_claim: Do not claim N_ref=1.0 represents a measured charge density.

parameters.name: Conceptual mapping N_ref to D_it (future)
parameters.role: conceptual link between N_ref and literature D_it values
parameters.dimension: would be C/m^2 or C/m^3 if calibrated
parameters.measurement_method: requires D_it extraction + t_eff + unit conversion
parameters.conversion_to_SI: N_ref_phys = q * D_it * delta_E / t_eff (requires all sub-parameters)
parameters.rationale: Conceptually, N_ref could be linked to q*D_it, but this requires unit conversion infrastructure and device-specific t_eff. Not implemented.
parameters.limitations: Requires unit conversion infrastructure not yet available. Requires device-specific t_eff (T3).
parameters.do_not_claim: Do not claim this mapping is implemented or validated.

parameters.name: Effective thickness
parameters.rationale: Interface region thickness depends on oxide quality and device architecture.
parameters.limitations: Device-specific. Cannot be universally set.
parameters.do_not_claim: Do not claim t_eff represents a specific device oxide thickness.

parameters.name: Thermal coupling weight
parameters.rationale: Demonstrative coupling coefficient. No physical anchor exists.
parameters.limitations: Purely structural parameter for pipeline validation.
parameters.do_not_claim: Do not claim lambda_T represents a measurable physical coupling.

parameters.name: Defect coupling weight
parameters.rationale: Demonstrative coupling coefficient.
parameters.limitations: Purely structural.
parameters.do_not_claim: Do not claim lambda_C represents a measurable physical coupling.

parameters.name: Saturation concentration
parameters.rationale: Dimensionless normalization. If C_def were physical, C_sat would represent max trap occupation.
parameters.limitations: C_def is not a physical concentration.
parameters.do_not_claim: Do not interpret C_sat as a physical trap saturation density.

parameters.name: Defect diffusion pre-exponential

candidate_range.note: Bracht1998 D0 pre-exponential; MVP value 1e-8 is BELOW this range

parameters.conversion_to_SI: cm^2/s to m^2/s: multiply by 1e-4. CORRECTED: 0.002-10 cm^2/s = 2e-7 to 1e-3 m^2/s (NOT 1e-14 to 1e-8)
parameters.rationale: MVP value (1e-8 m^2/s) is below the Bracht1998 D0 range (2e-7 to 1e-3 m^2/s). It may be interpreted as a model-scale parameter, not a direct D0. D0 vs D(T) distinction: D(T)=D0*exp(-Ea/kT) can be orders of magnitude smaller than D0 at low T.
parameters.limitations: Strongly depends on defect species, charge state, and Fermi level. Must not confuse D0 (pre-exponential) with D(T) (temperature-dependent effective diffusivity).
parameters.do_not_claim: Do not claim D0_def represents a specific measured diffusion coefficient or pre-exponential.

parameters.name: Defect diffusion activation energy
parameters.rationale: 0.5 eV is consistent with vacancy migration barrier upper bound. Full self-diffusion activation is 3-5 eV.
parameters.limitations: Migration energy != total activation energy. Model uses migration-only proxy.
parameters.do_not_claim: Do not claim E_D represents the full self-diffusion activation energy.

parameters.name: Defect generation rate pre-factor
parameters.rationale: Toy value. No direct experimental anchor for this functional form.
parameters.limitations: Real generation rates depend on irradiation fluence or thermal equilibrium.
parameters.do_not_claim: Do not claim G0 represents a measured defect generation rate.

parameters.name: Defect recombination rate
parameters.rationale: Toy value. Recombination depends on capture cross-section and carrier density.
parameters.limitations: Not anchored to any measurement.
parameters.do_not_claim: Do not claim R0 represents a physical recombination rate.

parameters.name: Permittivity (Poisson solver)
parameters.role: homogeneous dielectric constant in Poisson equation
parameters.rationale: Demonstrative placeholder. Physical solver would use epsilon_r * epsilon_0.
parameters.limitations: Homogeneous. Real devices have spatially varying epsilon.
parameters.do_not_claim: Do not claim epsilon=1.0 represents any physical permittivity.

parameters.name: Thermal diffusivity
parameters.rationale: Order-of-magnitude correct for Si near room temperature.
parameters.limitations: Temperature-dependent in reality. Single value used.

parameters.name: Grid spacing x
parameters.rationale: Purely numerical. Constrained by stability (CFL).
parameters.limitations: none

parameters.name: Convergence tolerance
parameters.rationale: Standard numerical convergence threshold.
parameters.limitations: none

parameters.name: Maximum iterations
parameters.rationale: Conservative iteration budget.
parameters.limitations: none
